mapper.select: SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS appointments, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS paid, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN #{defaultPrice} ELSE 0 END) AS income FROM appointment WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL (#{days} - 1) DAY) AND status IN (0, 1, 2) /* 仅统计有效预约 */ GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT d.id AS departmentId, d.name AS departmentName, COUNT(a.id) AS appointmentCount, ROUND(COUNT(a.id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointment WHERE status IN (0,1,2)), 2) AS ratio FROM department d LEFT JOIN doctor doc ON d.id = doc.department_id LEFT JOIN appointment a ON doc.id = a.doctor_id AND a.status IN (0,1,2) GROUP BY d.id, d.name ORDER BY appointmentCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT doc.id AS doctorId, doc.name AS doctorName, dept.name AS departmentName, COUNT(a.id) AS appointmentCount, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(ev.score), 2), 0) AS avgScore FROM doctor doc LEFT JOIN department dept ON doc.department_id = dept.id LEFT JOIN appointment a ON doc.id = a.doctor_id AND a.status IN (0,1,2) LEFT JOIN evaluation ev ON a.id = ev.appointment_id AND ev.status = 1 WHERE doc.status = 1 GROUP BY doc.id, doc.name, dept.name
ORDER BY avgScore DESC, appointmentCount DESC
ORDER BY appointmentCount DESC, avgScore DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT status, CASE status WHEN 0 THEN '待支付' WHEN 1 THEN '已支付' WHEN 2 THEN '已就诊' WHEN 3 THEN '已取消' WHEN 4 THEN '已过期' ELSE '未知' END AS label, COUNT(*) AS count FROM appointment GROUP BY status ORDER BY status
